title: Day 4 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition 2
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - なにをたべますか。 (Nani o tabemaska?) = What do you eat?

Sentence 2 - ぱんとたまごをたべます。たかはしさんは。(Pan to tamago o tabemas. Takahashi-san wa?) = I eat bread and eggs. What about you Takahashi san?

Sentence 3 - わたしはなにもたべません。(Watashi wa nani mo tabemasen) = I do not eat anything.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
